title: Cloud Control Plane Hijack
subtitle: Detect and contain cloud IAM abuse, logging disruption, and cross-account pivoting

steps.title: Compromised IAM Credentials
steps.description: Attacker obtains IAM access key from exposed repository or phishing.

steps.title: Cloud Environment Mapping
steps.description: Enumerate IAM users, roles, policies, and logging configuration.

steps.title: Admin Policy Attachment
steps.description: Attach AdministratorAccess policy and remove permission boundaries.

steps.title: IAM Escalation Alert
steps.description: Sentinel and Sigma detect admin policy attachment from unknown source.

steps.title: Disable Logging
steps.description: Stop CloudTrail, delete VPC flow logs, disable GuardDuty.

steps.title: Logging Disruption Alert
steps.description: Critical alert fires on CloudTrail StopLogging event.

steps.title: Cross-Account Pivot
steps.description: Assume roles in 3 additional accounts using organization trust.

steps.title: Network Exposure
steps.description: Open security groups to 0.0.0.0/0 for persistent backdoor access.

steps.title: Automated Cloud Containment
steps.description: CLAW revokes sessions, attaches deny-all, restores logging.

steps.title: IAM Audit & Remediation
steps.description: Audit all changes, rollback unauthorized modifications, rotate credentials.
